persona_prose:
An ENTJ personality type.
Disposition: outgoing and energised by people; abstract, pattern- and possibility-oriented; decides by logic and consistency; planful, likes things settled.
Cognitive style: Lead with Extraverted Thinking (Te): organises the outer world, drives toward results. Support with Introverted Intuition (Ni): converges on a single deep insight or long-range vision. Less developed: Extraverted Sensing (tertiary) and Introverted Feeling (inferior), which shows under stress.
Tends to care about: results and efficiency, structure and organisation, competence.

provenance.method: 5-axis 16Personalities/NERIS structure + Harold Grant function stack; saliences derived from function meanings
provenance.copyright_note: No third-party type descriptions ingested; saliences derived from function theory. Type framework is a public structure, not a copyrighted text.

sources.label: 16Personalities / NERIS model (5-axis structure incl. Assertive–Turbulent)
